freeInsider.title: Free first sourcing check
freeInsider.slogan: A practical first read from Agent Huang on the China side.
freeInsider.whyFree: I've spent 10 years in the system, and I'm tired of seeing honest Western buyers getting scammed or frustrated. I want to build a relationship first. If I can save you from a bad deal with a 10-minute chat, I've done my job as a friend. If you need me for an on-site audit later, you know where to find me.

included.title: Quick Factory Check
included.body: Send me a link or a name; I will tell you if they look like a real factory or a "bedroom" trader in 5 minutes.

included.title: Cultural & Business Translator
included.body: Confused by a factory's "vague" reply? I translate the real meaning behind their Chinese business talk.

included.title: General Sourcing Advice
included.body: Tips on shipping, local holidays, or market trends. No strings attached.

paidModules.title: Strategic Sourcing & Verification

paidModules.whenToBook: Before you lock terms or pay a large deposit to a new vendor.

bullets.title: Real-world Verification
bullets.body: I don't trust Alibaba photos. I go onsite to verify their actual production capacity and legal DNA.

bullets.body: Using local knowledge and native language to cut through middleman markups and secure the best MOQs for you.

bullets.title: Factory vs. Trader

paidModules.focus: Save on freight, kill bad samples early.
paidModules.unit: + freight · (or per item — ask for a batch quote)
paidModules.whenToBook: When you are comparing 2+ suppliers and shipping samples from China is bleeding your margin.

bullets.title: 70% Logistics Saving
bullets.body: Send 5 factory samples to my hub. I combine them into ONE parcel to slash your international freight costs.

bullets.title: Unboxing Reviews
bullets.body: High-res video reviews of every sample before they leave China. If it's trash, we kill it early.

bullets.title: Quality Comparison
bullets.body: Side-by-side analysis to help you pick the winning supplier faster.

paidModules.title: Professional Quality Control (QC)
paidModules.integrator: Pre-shipment inspection + line monitoring + on-site dispute handling.
paidModules.focus: Reject bad goods, reject silent delays — before the 70% balance.
paidModules.whenToBook: Before final payment and before goods leave your supplier — every serious PO should pass this gate.

bullets.title: On-site AQL Inspection
bullets.body: Full check on functionality, packaging, and quantities before you pay the final 70%.

bullets.title: Timeline Monitoring
bullets.body: I'm the "headache" the factory fears. I monitor production lines so they don't miss your shipping date.

bullets.title: Dispute Resolution
bullets.body: If issues are found, I handle the rework negotiation on the factory floor, so you don't have to argue across the ocean.

paidModules.title: E-com Logistics & FBA Prep
paidModules.integrator: FBA prep + consolidated export + private label touches.
paidModules.focus: Shelf-ready, compliant, and branded — without a second project manager.
paidModules.whenToBook: When the PO is done and you need China-side prep + door delivery — tell me volume and channels.

bullets.title: FBA Compliance
bullets.body: Labeling, bagging, and palletizing that meets strict Amazon / Walmart requirements.

bullets.title: Global DDP Shipping
bullets.body: Sea, air, or rail. We handle customs and taxes so your goods arrive shelf-ready.

bullets.title: Private Labeling
bullets.body: Custom inserts, thank-you cards, and branded packaging to build your moat.

trustPillars.title: You pay. I work for you.
trustPillars.body: No factory commissions. No referral kickbacks. The invoice is between you and Huang Sourcing.

trustPillars.title: Zero conflict of interest

trustPillars.title: Evidence you can use

trustPillars.title: Fast, flat terms

proof.title: Buyer feedback from practical cases.
proof.lead: Short, specific outcomes from buyers who needed supplier checks, sample comparison, or pre-shipment evidence.

proofCards.name: David R.
proofCards.message: Agent Huang checked packaging and carton-label photos before we paid the balance. One carton label was wrong, so we asked the supplier to fix it before pickup.

proofCards.name: Sophie M.
proofCards.message: The factory said the order was ready for pickup. The onsite check showed missing cartons and mixed labels, so we delayed collection until the count matched the packing list.

proofCards.name: Marcus T.
proofCards.message: We had four suppliers with similar quotes. Agent Huang compared samples, MOQ details, and factory risk notes, then showed why one supplier was safer for the first order.

reportCta.lead: Photo evidence, defect notes, packaging checks, and practical decision points before paying a supplier.

meta.title: About Agent Huang
meta.description: Meet Agent Huang, your China-side sourcing partner for supplier checks, QC inspection, sample consolidation, and shipment prep before payment or pickup.

About.h1: Your China-side sourcing partner before you pay, ship, or scale.
About.tagline: Agent Huang helps overseas buyers verify suppliers, inspect products, compare quotes, and coordinate shipment prep in China — before money is sent or goods leave the factory.
About.locationNote: Based in China, supporting overseas buyers with supplier checks, QC inspection, packaging evidence, sample consolidation, and shipment prep.

trustPoints.title: Buyer-side by design
trustPoints.body: Paid by the buyer, not by the factory.

trustPoints.title: Evidence-first reports
trustPoints.body: Photos, findings, risk notes, and next steps.

trustPoints.title: China-side support
trustPoints.body: Supplier checks, QC inspection, samples, and shipment prep.

s1Body: I’m Agent Huang, founder of Huang Sourcing.
I work on the China side for overseas buyers who need a real person to check suppliers, products, packaging, labels, and shipment readiness before they send money or release goods.

My work sits between sourcing, supplier verification, QC inspection, sample consolidation, and shipment prep. The goal is simple: turn unclear supplier claims into photos, findings, risks, and clear next steps.
s2Body: I mainly help overseas buyers who do not have a trusted team on the ground in China.
This includes small importers, marketplace sellers, e-commerce brands, and first-time China buyers.

Many clients come to me when they have already found a supplier, received a quote, or approved a sample — but still need someone in China to check whether the supplier, product, packaging, or shipment is actually ready.
s3Body: In China, I help buyers review supplier claims, compare quotes, check factory signals, inspect products, document packaging and labels, consolidate samples, and coordinate shipment handoff when needed.
The work is practical and evidence-based: real photos, real findings, risk notes, and clear recommendations before the next payment or pickup decision.

workCards.title: Supplier checks
workCards.body: Factory signals, company background, quote sanity check, and supplier risk notes.

workCards.title: Product inspection
workCards.body: Appearance, simple function, packaging, labels, carton marks, and photo evidence.

workCards.title: Sample consolidation
workCards.body: Collect samples from multiple suppliers before you commit to a larger order.

workCards.title: Shipment prep
workCards.body: FBA labels, carton photos, pickup handoff, logistics coordination.

s4Body: I built Huang Sourcing because many overseas buyers are asked to make payment and shipment decisions with too little visibility.

A supplier may sound confident. A quote may look attractive. A sample may look good. But before the final balance is paid or the goods leave the factory, the buyer still needs someone to check the practical details: who the supplier is, what was packed, whether labels match, whether cartons are ready, and what risks are visible.
Huang Sourcing exists to give buyers a China-side partner who is paid by the buyer, not by the factory. If something looks risky, I say so before it becomes your shipment problem.
s5Body: I do not try to make every supplier look bad. I also do not write reports just to make suppliers look good. I look for practical risks that matter to the buyer’s next decision.

Sometimes the right answer is a quick desk check. Sometimes it is a supplier verification. Sometimes it is a sample review, a packaging check, or a pre-shipment inspection. And sometimes the safest advice is to slow down before sending the next payment.
About.s6NextStep: Agent Huang will suggest the safest next step: desk check, quote comparison, sample review, onsite visit, QC inspection, or shipment prep support.
About.s6Turnaround: Standard inspection reports target a 24-hour turnaround after the onsite work is complete.
scopeBody: I help reduce sourcing and shipment risk, but no inspection can remove every risk.

Unless specifically scoped, Huang Sourcing does not replace laboratory testing, legal due diligence, customs compliance review, or full marketplace compliance approval. The purpose is to give the buyer practical evidence and a clearer decision before payment or shipment.
Client supplier details, order information, photos, documents, and reports are handled confidentially. Public sample files never include client-specific information.
personalNoteBody: Most sourcing problems I see are not dramatic at first. They start small: a supplier name that does not match the factory, a carton label that is slightly wrong, a sample that looks better than bulk goods, or a shipment that is rushed before the buyer has real evidence.
My job is not to create fear. My job is to make the risk visible early enough for you to make a better decision.
If the supplier looks fine, I will say so. If something looks risky, I will say that too — before it becomes your shipment problem.
